title: CityParts Pack
description: Modpack focussed arround Create with CityParts for creative building
body:
# CityParts Pack — Creative City-Building Playground
CityParts Pack is a creative-focused Minecraft modpack built around dynamic city building and imaginative construction

Featuring the custom Cityparts mod alongside TrafficCraft, Create + addons, Farmer’s Delight (with food & decor expansions), and hand-picked decoration and QoL mods, this pack gives you the tools to design bustling urban landscapes from the ground up

Explore a rich suite of building blocks, customizable traffic systems, functional street signage, working traffic lights, and modular Create contraptions — all geared toward easing the creative process and inspiring detailed cities. Whether you’re crafting sprawling metropolises, themed neighborhoods, or intricate infrastructure, this pack brings your architectural vision to life

## 🔧 Features
- Build without limits using Create’s mechanics and automation tools ⚙️
- Add immersive city detail with Cityparts 🧱
- Design realistic roads and traffic systems with TrafficCraft 🚗🚦
- Decorate your world with furniture, food, and atmosphere from Farmer’s Delight and addons 🌿
- Includes decor & quality-of-life mods to enrich creative workflows 🎨

Perfect for players who love designing cities, urban planners at heart, or anyone who wants a creative sandbox with deep building options
